Proof

Case studies.

Real deployments, real numbers. The results your customers can expect, across hospitality, retail, healthcare, transport, and the public sector.

Public sector
Newcastle City Council

Building one of the UK's most connected cities with free WiFi for local businesses.

2.3m
logins since launch

Drove guest engagement and data capture while reducing manual marketing effort.

1.7m
logins since launch

Paignton Zoo

Discovered valuable customer insights through WiFi analytics, live since late 2016.

26k
lines of active customer data

52%
increase in Facebook likes in a month

WiFi sessions in year one

Took guest WiFi from a single coffee shop to every ward, live in two weeks.

visitors annually
